EARNINGS_SMOOTHING.dollar_impact: hundreds of millions of dollars in excess reserves
income before taxes inflated by 20% and 17% in Q2 and Q3 FY2005; also an almost $1 million sale
overstated net income by up to $20 million in FY2006; understated net income in earlier periods by creating reserves
